title: Fix persistent profile loading / infinite spinner blocking dashboard access

requirements.text: Audit and rewrite `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts` (without modifying the immutable `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts` path ‚Äî instead patch the internal logic exposed to consumers) so that `isActorReady` is only set to `true` after both (a) the Internet Identity principal is fully resolved and non-anonymous, and (b) the actor instance is confirmed non-null. Expose `isActorReady` as a stable boolean via the hook's return value. If the file is immutable, create a thin `useActorReady.ts` wrapper hook in `frontend/src/hooks/` that derives and exports `isActorReady` from the existing `useActor` hook.
acceptanceCriteria: `isActorReady` is `false` while the identity is initializing or the actor is null.
`isActorReady` becomes `true` only when the actor is non-null and the principal is authenticated and resolved.
No existing immutable file is modified.

requirements.text: Rewrite `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` ‚Äî specifically the `useGetProfile` query ‚Äî so that: (1) the query's `enabled` flag is strictly gated on `isActorReady === true`; (2) the React Query cache key includes the authenticated principal string (e.g. `['profile', principalText]`) so it auto-invalidates when the principal changes; (3) a `null` / empty optional returned by the backend is treated as 'profile not found' (new user flow) and not as an error; (4) only a thrown exception is treated as a genuine fetch failure. All other query hooks in the file must also gate their `enabled` flag on `isActorReady`.
acceptanceCriteria: Cache key includes the principal so re-authentication triggers a fresh fetch.
A `null` backend response sets a `profileNotFound` flag / returns `data: null` without entering the error state.
A thrown error sets `isError: true` and surfaces a retry mechanism.

requirements.text: Rewrite `frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx` to implement the following strict state machine: (1) While `isActorReady` is `false` OR the profile query `isLoading` is `true` ‚Üí render a full-page military-themed loading skeleton/spinner (no redirect, no children). (2) If the profile query `isError` is `true` ‚Üí render a full-page error state with a gold-accented 'Retry' button that calls `refetch()`. (3) If the user is definitively unauthenticated (identity hook confirms not logged in AND actor initialization is complete) ‚Üí redirect to `/login`. (4) If `data` is `null` (profile not found, new user) ‚Üí render `<ProfileSetupModal>` without redirecting. (5) If profile data is present ‚Üí render `<Outlet />` / children. Eliminate any race condition where the component redirects to login during the loading phase.

quotes: still loading and cant veiw pl make changes and make it

acceptanceCriteria: No redirect to `/login` occurs while identity or actor is still initializing.
A full-page spinner is visible until both actor and profile query resolve.
A 'Retry' button is shown when the profile fetch errors.
New users see `ProfileSetupModal` instead of a redirect.
Authenticated users with a profile see the dashboard without an infinite spinner.

requirements.text: Audit `frontend/src/App.tsx` ‚Äî specifically the `AuthGuard` component ‚Äî to ensure it does not redirect unauthenticated or 'still-initializing' users to `/login` before the Internet Identity `isInitializing` / `isLoading` flag has settled to `false`. The guard must wait for initialization to complete before making any routing decision. If `isInitializing` is `true`, render the same full-page loading skeleton used in `ProtectedRoute`.
acceptanceCriteria: `AuthGuard` never redirects while the identity client is still initializing.
A loading skeleton is shown during initialization.
After initialization, routing decisions (redirect vs. render children) are correct.

requirements.text: Audit `backend/main.mo` ‚Äî specifically the `getProfile` function ‚Äî to confirm it returns `null` (empty optional `?UserProfile`) when no profile exists for the caller principal, and only traps or returns an error for genuine runtime failures. If it currently traps on a missing profile or returns an error variant for 'not found', fix it to return `null` instead. Do not change any other backend logic or data structures.
acceptanceCriteria: `getProfile` returns `null` (empty optional) when the caller has no profile ‚Äî it does not trap.
`getProfile` only traps or returns an error for genuine runtime failures.
No other backend functions or data models are changed.

constraints: Do not modify any file listed in frontend.immutablePaths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
All fixes must be compatible with the existing military-inspired visual theme (matte black, military green, gold accents).
Do not introduce any new backend data models or change existing schema.
nonGoals: Changing the visual theme or color palette.
Modifying sidebar links or custom link management.
